title: Notifications digest panel

description: Surface actionable alerts (anomalies, failures) with quick route-to-task/approval actions.

description: Collect name/email/use-case+tier interest and persist safely (Airtable, Supabase, etc.).

title: Design minimal guided install/chat flow
description: Interactive helper to ask OS/stack, walk 4–8 install steps, and escalate to Concierge when blocked.

title: Define Revenue Lab experiment template
description: Document standard fields (hypothesis, channel, EV, effort, owner, status) as schema for backlog.

description: Seed 5+ scored experiments (pricing, YouTube funnel, AI spend dashboard, bounty automations).

description: List 2–4 marketplaces or repos plus filters aligned with TS/Next/AI skills and payout targets.

description: Claim bounty #21873, secure access, implement Google OAuth regression fix + tests per acceptance criteria.

description: Surface docs/approvals entries in UI (list, detail, status) so Nate can approve inside Mission Control.

title: Add Mission Control load meter
description: Scan tasks/experiments, assign story points per agent, and render color-coded availability tile.

title: Wire Activity rail to Supabase
description: Replace JSON feed with Supabase activity_log + subscriptions for live agent updates.

title: Trigger agents on task status change
description: Watch Supabase tasks updates and kick off Henry/Steve when column moves to In Progress.

title: Spec Supabase worker for backlog sweeps
description: Design a Supabase Edge Function/worker that scans backlog items and triggers sub-agent pickup automatically.

title: Finish Data tab polish + alerts
description: Add live filters, anomaly surfacing into Tasks/Approvals, and UX polish once ingestion pipeline is stable.

title: Normalize Supabase migration versions for CLI
description: Rename the legacy 8-digit Supabase migration files or repair schema_migrations so `supabase db push` can run cleanly without duplicates.
